_components.$content:
Fusion weapons are a powerful variant of plasma weapons. Like most energy weapons, they inflict more total damage and have reduced Armour Penetration, with exceptional Armour Destruction for their size. However, they can also inflict a lot of Bleeding Wounds.

Fusion weapons tend to destabilize quickly in atmosphere, resulting in very short optimal ranges and a more rapid accuracy/damage dropoff than ballistic weapons. However, they have somewhat improved ammo economy over lasers, and have a high chance of starting fires wherever they hit.

This fusion rifle has a range dropoff of 12.5% (ballistics are 10%), and a 65% chance of setting a tile ablaze.
